title: lysimachia thyrsiflora
intro: Lysimachia thyrsiflora, also known as the golden creeping Jenny, is a flowering perennial plant native to Asia and Europe. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lysimachia thyrsiflora include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Lysimachia thyrsiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
